items.title: Ask HN: Why do none of the major AI agents persist memory across sessions?
items.summary:
ChatGPT has “memory” but it’s basically a notepad. 
Claude’s CLAUDE.md is manual. 
No agent actually learns from past interaction. 
What am I missing? Is this fundamentally hard or just not prioritized? Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48291522 Points: 1 # Comments: 0
